description: Live-gated release proof: dispatch one Codex role to macOS, Ubuntu, and native Windows workers through AO Runtime host tags.
common_instructions: Return a STATUS block with Result, Artifact, Evidence, Concerns, and Blocker.
Do not include secrets, private network addresses, auth paths, or full transcripts.
Write only the declared output path.

instructions: Record that the requested host tags were mac,live.
Include local OS evidence from the worker, but do not include hostnames or private paths.
Record that the requested host tag was ubuntu.
Include local OS evidence from the worker, but do not include hostnames or private paths.
Record that the requested host tags were windows,live.
Include local OS evidence from the worker using PowerShell, but do not include hostnames or private paths.
Do not run `uname`; native Windows proof should use `[System.Environment]::OSVersion.VersionString` or `$PSVersionTable` and report only that the command returned text.
State explicitly that this was native Windows, not WSL, if the worker evidence supports it.
Return DONE only if mac-live, ubuntu-live, and windows-live all produced non-blocked evidence.
List the three requested host-tag groups: mac,live; ubuntu; windows,live.
Treat full live provider dispatch across all three hosts as the acceptance target.
